---
title: "Ch 1: Initial Contact"
subtitle: "Step 2- plots"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-03"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(mclogit)
library(patchwork)
library(amt)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
```

# Load in data

```{r}
# top models from step 1
mod_list <- readRDS("~/OneDrive - University of Wyoming/Documents/UWyo/PhD project/PhD_Chapter_1/Code output/InitialContact_TopModel.rds") 

# data used to build model
data <- readRDS("~/OneDrive - University of Wyoming/Documents/UWyo/PhD project/PhD_Chapter_1/Code output/gps_contact_data.rds")

# set all categorical data as factors
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(across(c("time_of_day", "season", "species",  
                  "travel_state", "contact", "cid"), as.factor))

# scale and center the continuous variables
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(across(c("herb_biom", "tree_cover", "TRI_90m", "HR_size_km2",
                  "rel_herb_biom", "rel_tree_cover",
                  "rel_TRI_90m"), ~as.numeric(scale(.))))
```

```{r}
# export coefficient & p-value tables
coef_df <- list()

for(i in 1:length(mod_list)){
  sm <- summary(mod_list[[i]])$coefficients
  
  coef_df[[i]] <- data.frame(
    Term = rownames(sm),
    Estimate = sm[, 1],
    `Std.Error` = sm[, 2],
    `P.value` = sm[, 4],
    row.names = NULL
  )
  
  coef_df[[i]] <- coef_df[[i]] %>%
    mutate(
      Estimate = round(Estimate, 3),
      `Std.Error` = round(`Std.Error`, 3),
      `P.value` = signif(`P.value`, 3),
      `P.value` = formatC(`P.value`, format = "e", digits = 3)
    )
  
  coef_df[[i]] <- coef_df[[i]] %>% 
    mutate(Species = names(mod_list)[[i]],
           Encounter.with = if_else(str_split_i(Term, "~", 1) == 1, "Same species",
                                    "Different species"),
           Predictor = str_split_i(Term, "~", 2)
             ) %>% 
    filter(Predictor != "(Intercept)") %>% 
    select(-Term)
}

coef_df <- bind_rows(coef_df)

coef_df <- coef_df %>% 
  select(Species, Predictor, Encounter.with, everything())

coef_df <- coef_df %>% 
  mutate(Predictor = case_when(
    str_detect(Predictor, "herb_biom") ~ "Forage biomass",
    str_detect(Predictor, "tree_cover") ~ "Tree cover",
    str_detect(Predictor, "TRI_90m") ~ "Ruggedness",
    str_detect(Predictor, "time_of_dayevening") ~ "Time: evening",
    str_detect(Predictor, "time_of_daymorning") ~ "Time: morning",
    str_detect(Predictor, "time_of_daynight") ~ "Time: night",
    str_detect(Predictor, "HR_size_km2") ~ "Home range area",
    str_detect(Predictor, "travel_state1") ~ "Behavior state: travel",
    str_detect(Predictor, "seasonspring") ~ "Season: spring",
    str_detect(Predictor, "seasonsummer") ~ "Season: summer",
    str_detect(Predictor, "seasonfall") ~ "Season: fall"
    
  ))

ft <- flextable(coef_df) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs()

doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_par("Species Encounter Results", style = "heading 1") |>
  body_add_flextable(ft)

print(doc, target = "~/OneDrive - University of Wyoming/Documents/UWyo/PhD project/PhD_Chapter_1/Code output/encounter_initialcontact_results.docx")
```


# Generate predictions

```{r}
# per species and  variable of interest, generate model predicted outcomes
pred_list <- vector("list", 5)

# pull species names
spp <- unique(data$species)

for(i in 1:length(spp)){
# pull model terms
terms <- terms(mod_list[[i]])

# pull model formula
formula <- formula(mod_list[[i]])

# pull fixed effect coefficients
coefs <- coef(mod_list[[i]])  

# arrange coef in a named list: one set per outcome (e.g., "1", "2")
coefs_list <- list()
coefs_list[["1"]] <- coefs[grepl("1~", names(coefs))]
coefs_list[["2"]] <- coefs[grepl("2~", names(coefs))]

# pull species data
df <- data %>% filter(species == spp[[i]])

# predict data for species that actual gis was in top model
if(spp[[i]] != "pronghorn"){
# first, create new data for each variable of interest, holding other predictors constant
# herb_biomass
pred_list[[i]][["herb_biom"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  herb_biom = seq(min(df$herb_biom, na.rm = T), 
                  max(df$herb_biom, na.rm = T), length.out = 20),
  tree_cover = mean(df$tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  TRI_90m = mean(df$TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# tree_cover
pred_list[[i]][["tree_cover"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  tree_cover = seq(min(df$tree_cover, na.rm = T), 
                  max(df$tree_cover, na.rm = T), length.out = 20),
  herb_biom = mean(df$herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  TRI_90m = mean(df$TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# TRI
pred_list[[i]][["TRI_90m"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  TRI_90m = seq(min(df$TRI_90m, na.rm = T), 
                  max(df$TRI_90m, na.rm = T), length.out = 20),
  herb_biom = mean(df$herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  tree_cover = mean(df$tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# HR_size
pred_list[[i]][["HR_size_km2"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  HR_size_km2 = seq(min(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T), 
                  max(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T), length.out = 20),
  herb_biom = mean(df$herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  TRI_90m = mean(df$TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  tree_cover = mean(df$tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# time of day
pred_list[[i]][["time_of_day"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  herb_biom = mean(df$herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  TRI_90m = mean(df$TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  tree_cover = mean(df$tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = levels(df$time_of_day),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# travel state
pred_list[[i]][["travel_state"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  herb_biom = mean(df$herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  TRI_90m = mean(df$TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  tree_cover = mean(df$tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = levels(df$travel_state),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# season
pred_list[[i]][["season"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  herb_biom = mean(df$herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  TRI_90m = mean(df$TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  tree_cover = mean(df$tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = levels(df$season))
}else{
  # herb_biomass
pred_list[[i]][["herb_biom"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  rel_herb_biom = seq(min(df$rel_herb_biom, na.rm = T), 
                  max(df$rel_herb_biom, na.rm = T), length.out = 20),
  rel_tree_cover = mean(df$rel_tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  rel_TRI_90m = mean(df$rel_TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# rel_tree_cover
pred_list[[i]][["tree_cover"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  rel_tree_cover = seq(min(df$rel_tree_cover, na.rm = T), 
                  max(df$rel_tree_cover, na.rm = T), length.out = 20),
  rel_herb_biom = mean(df$rel_herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  rel_TRI_90m = mean(df$rel_TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# TRI
pred_list[[i]][["TRI_90m"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  rel_TRI_90m = seq(min(df$rel_TRI_90m, na.rm = T), 
                  max(df$rel_TRI_90m, na.rm = T), length.out = 20),
  rel_herb_biom = mean(df$rel_herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  rel_tree_cover = mean(df$rel_tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# HR_size
pred_list[[i]][["HR_size_km2"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  HR_size_km2 = seq(min(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T), 
                  max(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T), length.out = 20),
  rel_herb_biom = mean(df$rel_herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  rel_TRI_90m = mean(df$rel_TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  rel_tree_cover = mean(df$rel_tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# time of day
pred_list[[i]][["time_of_day"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  rel_herb_biom = mean(df$rel_herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  rel_TRI_90m = mean(df$rel_TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  rel_tree_cover = mean(df$rel_tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = levels(df$time_of_day),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# travel state
pred_list[[i]][["travel_state"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  rel_herb_biom = mean(df$rel_herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  rel_TRI_90m = mean(df$rel_TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  rel_tree_cover = mean(df$rel_tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = levels(df$travel_state),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = factor("winter", levels = levels(df$season)))

# season
pred_list[[i]][["season"]] <- expand.grid(
  contact = unique(df$contact),
  HR_size_km2 = mean(df$HR_size_km2, na.rm = T),
  rel_herb_biom = mean(df$rel_herb_biom, na.rm = T),
  rel_TRI_90m = mean(df$rel_TRI_90m, na.rm = T),
  rel_tree_cover = mean(df$rel_tree_cover, na.rm = T),
  travel_state = factor("0", levels = levels(df$travel_state)),
  time_of_day = factor("day", levels = levels(df$time_of_day)),
  season = levels(df$season))
}


for(j in 1:length(pred_list[[i]])){

X_new <- stats::model.matrix(terms, data = pred_list[[i]][[j]])

# generate model predicted outcomes
pred <- sapply(coefs_list, function(beta) {
  X_new %*% beta
})

# convert predictions to probabilities
pred <- cbind(1, exp(pred))  # first column = reference category
pred <- pred / rowSums(pred)

# add to df
pred_list[[i]][[j]]$pred_0 <- pred[,1]
pred_list[[i]][[j]]$pred_1 <- pred[,2]
pred_list[[i]][[j]]$pred_2 <- pred[,3]

}

# add standard error estimates for each coeff
# Stack coefficients (K-1) × p into one vector
beta_all <- do.call(rbind, coefs_list)
beta_vec <- as.vector(t(beta_all))  # length = (K-1) * p

# variance-covariance matrix of model
vcov_mat <- vcov(mod_list[[i]])  # (K-1)*p × (K-1)*p

# loop through each predicted dataset

for(j in 1:length(pred_list[[i]])){

  newdata <- pred_list[[i]][[j]] %>% select(-pred_0, -pred_1, -pred_2)
  X_new <- model.matrix(formula, data = newdata)
  
  n <- nrow(X_new)
  p <- ncol(X_new)
  K <- length(coefs_list) + 1  # add reference category
  
  se_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = n, ncol = K)

for (k in 1:n) {
  x <- X_new[k, , drop = FALSE]  # 1 × p

  # Compute logits for non-reference categories
  eta <- sapply(coefs_list, function(beta) x %*% beta)
  eta <- as.numeric(eta)

  # Softmax step
  logits <- c(0, eta)
  probs <- exp(logits) / sum(exp(logits))

  # Jacobian of softmax (K × K)
  J <- diag(probs) - outer(probs, probs)

  # Create full x for (K-1)*p vectorization
  # Design matrix per category: block matrix
  x_block <- matrix(0, nrow = K - 1, ncol = (K - 1) * p)
  for (m in 1:(K - 1)) {
    idx <- ((m - 1) * p + 1):(m * p)
    x_block[m, idx] <- x
  }

  # Variance of linear predictors (K-1 × K-1)
  V_eta <- x_block %*% vcov_mat %*% t(x_block)

  # Add 0 row/column for reference category
  V_eta_full <- matrix(0, nrow = K, ncol = K)
  V_eta_full[2:K, 2:K] <- V_eta

  # Delta method: Var(p) = J %*% V_eta_full %*% t(J)
  V_p <- J %*% V_eta_full %*% t(J)

  # Standard errors are square roots of diagonal
  se_mat[k, ] <- sqrt(diag(V_p))
}
  pred_list[[i]][[j]]$se_0 <- se_mat[,1]
  pred_list[[i]][[j]]$se_1 <- se_mat[,2]
  pred_list[[i]][[j]]$se_2 <- se_mat[,3]
}
}
```


```{r}
# combine species predicted data for plotting

## first add species variable
for(i in 1:length(pred_list)){
  for(j in 1:length(pred_list[[i]])){
    pred_list[[i]][[j]]$species <- spp[i]
  }
}

## then remove rel_ from pronghorn gis variables
for(j in 1:length(pred_list[[5]])){
  pred_list[[5]][[j]] <- pred_list[[5]][[j]] %>% 
    rename_with(~ str_remove(., "^rel_"), starts_with("rel_"))
}

## finally, combine data
pred_comb <- list()
ls_name <- names(pred_list[[1]])

for(i in 1:length(ls_name)){
pred_comb[[ls_name[[i]]]] <- bind_rows(lapply(pred_list[1:5], 
                                              `[[`, 
                                              ls_name[[i]]))
}
```

# Coefficients & 95% confidence intervals

```{r}
# pull exponentiated coefficients & 95% confidence intervals for each model
coef_list <- list()
spp <- names(mod_list)

for(i in 1:length(mod_list)){
  
  coefs <- coef(mod_list[[i]])
  
coefs_1 <- coefs[grepl("1~", names(coefs))]
coefs_2 <- coefs[grepl("2~", names(coefs))]

ci <-confint(mod_list[[i]])

ci_l_1 <- ci[grepl("1~", row.names(ci)),1]
ci_u_1 <- ci[grepl("1~", row.names(ci)), 2]

ci_l_2 <- ci[grepl("2~", row.names(ci)),1]
ci_u_2 <- ci[grepl("2~", row.names(ci)), 2]

coef_list[[i]] <- data.frame(coefs = c(coefs_1, coefs_2),
                         variable = c(names(coefs_1), names(coefs_2)),
                         ci_l = c(ci_l_1, ci_l_2),
                         ci_u = c(ci_u_1, ci_u_2),
                         species = as.character(spp[[i]]))
}

coef_list <- bind_rows(coef_list)

row.names(coef_list) <- NULL

coef_list <- coef_list %>% 
  mutate(species_type = if_else(grepl("1~", variable), "same species",
                                "different species")) %>% 
  mutate(variable = str_remove(variable, "1~")) %>% 
  mutate(variable = str_remove(variable, "2~"))

coef_list <- coef_list %>% 
  mutate(variable = str_remove(variable, "rel_"))
         
```

# Plots

```{r}
# set species colors
cols <- c("same species" = "magenta4", "different species" = "darkorange3")

# arrange species by browser -> grazer
coef_list <- coef_list %>% 
  mutate(species = factor(species, levels = c("bison", "bighorn",
                                              "elk", "deer", "pronghorn")))
```

```{r}
TRI_90m <- coef_list %>% 
  filter(variable %in% c("TRI_90m")) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = coefs, y = species, color = species_type)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_u), width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "grey") +
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1.5, 1.5)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-1, 0, 1)) +
  labs(y = "", x = "Ruggedness (coefficient)", title = "C") +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(species)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 10))

tree_cover <- coef_list %>% 
  filter(variable %in% c("tree_cover")) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = coefs, y = species, color = species_type)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_u), width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "grey") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1.5, 1.5)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-1, 0, 1)) +
  labs(y = "", x = "Tree cover (coefficient)", title = "B") +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(species)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 10))

herb_biom <- coef_list %>% 
  filter(variable %in% c("herb_biom")) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = coefs, y = species, color = species_type)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_u), width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "grey") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.5, 0.5)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5)) +
  labs(y = "", x = "Forage biomass (coefficient)", title = "A") +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(species)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 10))

HR_size_km2 <- coef_list %>% 
  filter(variable %in% c("HR_size_km2")) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = coefs, y = species, color = species_type)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_u), width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "grey") +
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-3, 3)) + 
  labs(y = "", x = "Home range area (coefficient)",
       title = "A") +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(species)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 10))


```

```{r}
pred1 <- pred_comb[["time_of_day"]] %>% 
  select(pred_1, se_1, species, time_of_day) %>% 
  rename(pred = pred_1, se = se_1) %>% 
  mutate(species_type = "same species")

pred2 <- pred_comb[["time_of_day"]] %>% 
  select(pred_2, se_2, species, time_of_day) %>% 
  rename(pred = pred_2, se = se_2) %>% 
  mutate(species_type = "different species")

time_df <- bind_rows(pred1, pred2)

time_df <- time_df %>% 
  group_by(species, species_type) %>% 
  mutate(scale_pred = pred / mean(pred)) %>% 
  ungroup()

time_df <- time_df %>%  
  mutate(species = factor(species, levels = c("bison", "bighorn",
                                              "elk", "deer", "pronghorn")))

time_of_day <- time_df %>% 
  mutate(time_of_day = factor(time_of_day, levels = c("morning", "day",
                                                      "evening", "night"))) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(x = time_of_day, y = scale_pred, color = species_type)) +
  geom_line(aes(x = time_of_day, y = scale_pred, color = species_type,
                group = species_type),
            linetype = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(species)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0.8, 1.2)) +
  labs(y = "Relative encounter probability", x = "",
       title = "B") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size = 10))
  
```

```{r}
pred1 <- pred_comb[["travel_state"]] %>% 
  select(pred_1, se_1, species, travel_state) %>% 
  rename(pred = pred_1, se = se_1) %>% 
  mutate(species_type = "same species")

pred2 <- pred_comb[["travel_state"]] %>% 
  select(pred_2, se_2, species, travel_state) %>% 
  rename(pred = pred_2, se = se_2) %>% 
  mutate(species_type = "different species")

travel_df <- bind_rows(pred1, pred2)

travel_df <- travel_df %>% 
  group_by(species, species_type) %>% 
  mutate(scale_pred = pred / mean(pred)) %>% 
  ungroup()

travel_df <- travel_df %>%  
  mutate(species = factor(species, levels = c("bison", "bighorn",
                                              "elk", "deer", "pronghorn"))) %>% 
  mutate(travel_state = if_else(travel_state == 1, "travel", "encamped"))

travel_state <- travel_df %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(x = travel_state, y = scale_pred, color = species_type)) +
  geom_line(aes(x = travel_state, y = scale_pred, color = species_type,
                group = species_type),
            linetype = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(species)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0.8, 1.2)) +
  labs(y = "Relative encounter probability", x = "", title = "C") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_blank()) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        title = element_text(size = 10)) 
  
```

```{r}
pred1 <- pred_comb[["season"]] %>% 
  select(pred_1, se_1, species, season) %>% 
  rename(pred = pred_1, se = se_1) %>% 
  mutate(species_type = "same species")

pred2 <- pred_comb[["season"]] %>% 
  select(pred_2, se_2, species, season) %>% 
  rename(pred = pred_2, se = se_2) %>% 
  mutate(species_type = "different species")

season_df <- bind_rows(pred1, pred2)

season_df <- season_df %>% 
  group_by(species, species_type) %>% 
  mutate(scale_pred = pred / mean(pred)) %>% 
  ungroup()

season_df <- season_df %>%  
  mutate(species = factor(species, levels = c("bison", "bighorn",
                                              "elk", "deer", "pronghorn"))) %>% 
  mutate(season = factor(season, levels = c("spring", "summer", "fall", "winter")))

season <- season_df %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(x = season, y = scale_pred, color = species_type)) +
  geom_line(aes(x = season, y = scale_pred, color = species_type,
                group = species_type),
            linetype = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(species)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0 , 2)) +
  labs(y = "Relative encounter probability", x = "", title = "D") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_blank()) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        title = element_text(size = 10)) 
  
```


```{r}
# final plot
# combine plots
contact_plot_spat <-
  (herb_biom | tree_cover ) / 
  (TRI_90m | season) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position='bottom')


contact_plot_beh <- 
(HR_size_km2 | time_of_day | travel_state) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position='bottom')
           

ggsave(plot = contact_plot_spat,
       filename = "~/OneDrive - University of Wyoming/Documents/UWyo/PhD project/PhD_Chapter_1/Figures/InitialContact_PubPlot_SpatialEnv.png",
       width = 4.5,
       height = 6,
       units = "in")

ggsave(plot = contact_plot_beh,
       filename = "~/OneDrive - University of Wyoming/Documents/UWyo/PhD project/PhD_Chapter_1/Figures/InitialContact_PubPlot_Beh.png",
       width = 6.5,
       height = 4,
       units = "in")
```
